prompt: Create a cinematic anime-style key visual of a young male soccer player standing in the middle of a rain-soaked futuristic city street at night as the urban skyline transforms into a colossal stadium atmosphere. Use a low-angle wide shot with the player centered slightly left, full body visible, wearing a dark navy soccer training jacket, matching shorts, knee-high socks with blue stripes, and athletic cleats. His face should be mostly hidden in shadow or softly blurred, with messy dark hair silhouetted against the lights. Place exactly 1 glowing soccer ball at his front foot, emitting intense electric blue light that reflects across the wet asphalt. On the right side, show exactly 1 huge digital billboard mounted on a glass high-rise, displaying the bold white all-caps slogan THE WORLD KICKS OFF on a blue stadium-like background. Include exactly 1 main human subject, exactly 1 soccer ball, exactly 1 prominent billboard, and exactly 3 visible traffic signals with red, green, and amber city lights contributing to the atmosphere. Surround the scene with dense high-rise buildings, packed stadium-like crowds implied in the architecture, bright windows, floodlights, and falling red, blue, and white confetti. The street must be glossy with puddles and mirror-like reflections of blue ball light, neon signs, traffic lights, and skyscraper windows. Mood: epic World Cup opening moment, dramatic, anticipatory, rain-drenched, high contrast, volumetric light, ultra-detailed anime realism, cinematic composition, sharp foreground reflections, deep blue color grading with red accents, no logos or watermarks.
